task_completion.description: Simulated Pulse Oximeter device adapter is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window for the Simulated Pulse Oximeter device adapter is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Alarm List clinical application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window for the Alarm List clinical application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A Low SpO2 alarm is triggered and visible in the Alarm List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Alarm List application displays an active alarm message indicating a Low SpO2 condition.

task_completion.description: The alarm trigger evidence screenshot is saved to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image file named 'alarm_trigger_evidence.png' is visible on the Desktop, in a file manager, or open in an image viewer.

task_completion.description: The JSON report is created with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'alarm_threshold_report.json' is visible on the Desktop or open in a text editor, containing a JSON object with keys 'device', 'threshold_value', and 'alarm_message'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenICE GUI applications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenICE Simulated Pulse Oximeter and Alarm List interfaces, not just terminal commands or mocked text files.

integrity.description: The alarm evidence screenshot is a genuine capture of the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot shows the actual Alarm List application with the triggered alarm, rather than manually typed text or a fabricated image.

integrity.description: The JSON report values match the GUI observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The threshold value and alarm message in the JSON report correspond to the actual values displayed in the Alarm List and Pulse Oximeter GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected SpO2 low alarm threshold is between 80 and 95. The JSON report must be saved at /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_threshold_report.json and the evidence screenshot at /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_trigger_evidence.png.
